title: Squirting syringe
body:
This mod is great small add-on to enhance adventure. Syringes spawns in chests so, this mod is not invisible while playing!

Squirting syringe is a mod with syringes which have different effects. you can create any syringe you like.

this mod includes:
  • heal syringe
  • warrior syringe
  • ghost syringe
  • mining syringe
  • falling syringe
  • mushroom syringe
  • luck syringe
  • fire syringe
  • focus syringe
  • clear syringe
and one item to create syringes:
  • syringe 💉
You can use syringes on yourself or... on ANY entities Now you can create syringes to fast heal, faster mining, easier fighting and much more. Do I plan forge edition? > nope Any other problems/suggestions post on Github
